stemHtml: A 250,000 kg aircraft has an engine failure after take-off and must return, but is over max landing weight. Why must fuel be jettisoned?

options.a: To reduce weight to max landing mass for structural integrity.
options.b: For noise abatement during overweight landing.
options.c: To reduce fire risk on landing.
options.d: To increase glide distance if total power fails.
